description: This file contains helper functions and mocks used in JavaScript tests, including fixture management, event creation, and DOM cleanup.

methods.name: getFixture
methods.description: Retrieves or creates a fixture DOM element with a specific ID for testing purposes.

methods.name: clearFixture
methods.description: Clears the inner HTML of the fixture element.

methods.name: createEvent
methods.description: Creates a new Event object with a given name and parameters.

methods.name: clearBodyAndDocument
methods.description: Removes specific attributes from the document's root and body elements to reset styles and padding.
